lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- Shopping for Style
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marlene Landucci | Aula 17 -- Shopping for Style

listenings.text: Welcome to our clothing store. Today we have many beautiful items for you. On the left, we have dresses in many colors: red, blue, green, and black. The blue dress is very popular this season. In the middle, you can find shirts and jackets. We have small, medium, and large sizes. If you like something, you can try it on in the fitting room at the back of the store. The shoes are near the window, in many colors and sizes. If the size is not right, just ask, and we will bring another one. Please take your time and enjoy your shopping. Let me know if you need any help.

Hi Marlene, this is Sofia. I am at the clothing store now, and it is wonderful. I found a beautiful red dress, and I want to try it on. They have your size too. There is a nice blue jacket that I think you will love. The shoes here are lovely, but my size is not available. Come and join me. We can try on clothes together and help each other choose. Remember, you wanted a new dress for the party. The colors here are perfect. Call me when you are close, and I will wait at the front. See you soon.

extra_audio.text: First, you walk into the clothing store and look at the clothes. Then you find a red dress that you like. After that, you ask the assistant for your size. Next, you try it on in the fitting room. Finally, you decide if you like the color and the size, and you buy it.
